---
title: "Farhan (Adin) Aditya R."
subtitle: "Economics · Policy · Data"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
- id: research
  contents: webpages/projects/research/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 3
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: analysis
  contents: webpages/projects/analysis/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 3
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: blog
  contents: webpages/projects/blog/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 3
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

## Research

:::{#research}
:::

[More →](webpages/projects/research.qmd)

---

## Analysis

:::{#analysis}
:::

[More →](webpages/projects/analysis.qmd)

---

:::{#blog}
